tools.name: avito.search_ads
tools.description: Use this when the user wants to search Avito.ma for classifieds, products, vehicles, properties, rentals, jobs, or services available in Morocco. Use this when the goal is to browse existing listings by keyword, city, category, or price range. Do not use for posting an ad, editing an ad, contacting a seller, negotiating, paying, or completing a transaction.
